archimate:Representation.name: Common Data Model
archimate:Representation.documentation:
Description: CDM is an ontology based on the FRBR model (Functional Requirements for Bibliographic Records). CDM uses RDF(S)/OWL technologies, capable of representing relationships between the resource types managed by the Publications Office and their views. All within the scope of the FRBR model and, therefore, in terms of Work, Expression, Manifestation and Item.
Publisher: The Publications Office of the European Union
Source: https://op.europa.eu/en/web/eu-vocabularies/cdm
LOST view: SV-Functional Architecture Principles
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/CommonDataModelRepresentation
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/CommonDataModelRepresentation
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataRepresentation

properties.value: The Publications Office of the European Union

CDM is an ontology based on the FRBR model (Functional Requirements for Bibliographic Records). CDM uses RDF(S)/OWL technologies, capable of representing relationships between the resource types managed by the Publications Office and their views. All within the scope of the FRBR model and, therefore, in terms of Work, Expression, Manifestation and Item.
